blended.narrative: Cranmore Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 408 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
